description: This scenario models a high-impact cyber attack affecting critical infrastructure, disrupting digital systems, governance processes, and cascading into economic and social instability.

cyber_stability.description: Major cyber breach affecting infrastructure, data integrity, and system operations

ai_governance.description: AI systems face operational disruption and emergency regulatory intervention

legal_coherence.description: Emergency measures and regulatory inconsistencies emerge

economic_resilience.description: Market disruption, financial instability, and operational slowdown

social_stability.description: Public anxiety, trust erosion, and potential unrest

decision_integrity_score.impact: System drops from stable to moderate risk category

recovery_dynamics.recovery_pattern: cyber restoration → economic stabilization → social normalization

uncertainty_model.notes: Outcome variability depends on response efficiency and cross-domain coordination

simulation_notes.purpose: Evaluates systemic vulnerability to cyber shocks and cross-domain cascading effects
simulation_notes.interpretation: Highlights dependency of governance and economy on cyber infrastructure
simulation_notes.usage: Cybersecurity policy modeling, national resilience planning, and crisis response simulation
